## Phase 0 — 12-axis classification

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Tier** | **T1 Agent-as-assistant — 14TH T1 entrant** + **NEW sub-archetype: OpenCode-first cross-domain multi-agent AI-DevOps platform** |
| **Archetype** | Solo-individual + commercial-positioning (`aidevops.sh` homepage + paid pool services) + multi-domain (13 specialist domains) + production-grade quality discipline (7-tool external platform stack) |
| **Scale tier** | **Cold-start** (212 stars, 39 forks, 11 open issues — 5.5 months old; ~38 stars/month). NOT viral. **2nd cold-start subject in corpus** after bizos v37 (18 stars at 2 days) — but with substantial mature surface, opposite of bizos. |
| **Primary lang** | **Bash 50%+** (aidevops.sh 69KB + aidevops-init-lib.sh 46KB + aidevops-skills-plugin-lib.sh 22KB + aidevops-repos-lib.sh 20KB + setup.sh 50KB + 873 helper scripts in `.agents/`) + **TypeScript** (Bun-based plugin runtime via `.opencode/server/api-gateway.ts` + `.opencode/tool/parallel-quality.ts` + Elysia + DSPy) + **Python** (DSPy env). **Bash-primary at scale = 4th in corpus** (gstack v3 / agency-agents v18 / pi-mono v36 mixed). |
| **Packaging** | **5-surface distribution**: npm (`aidevops` global @ 3.11.0) + Bun (`bun install -g aidevops`) + Homebrew tap (`marcusquinn/tap/aidevops`) + curl-installer (`bash <(curl -fsSL https://aidevops.sh/install)`) + git clone + `~/Git/aidevops/setup.sh`. Verified npm provenance. |
| **Origin story** | Solo-individual (Marcus Quinn, Jersey UK; ~8-year senior dev; prior 3.3K-star `git-updater` WordPress project) + founded explicitly **9 November 2025** + 3 major versions (1.0 → 3.11.0) in 5.5 months = aggressive velocity |
| **Methodology** | **Cross-domain multi-agent orchestration** with explicit **agent design pattern lineage** (Lance Martin / LangChain — 16 patterns mapped to aidevops implementations, README §"Agent Design Patterns") + **Ralph loops** + **mngr (imbue-ai) ratchet pattern** lineage (CREDITS.md) + **TOON token-efficient serialization** (aidevops-originated; 20-60% reduction). Anti-thesis: "Sane vibe-coding through structure" (Pattern #51 vibe-spectrum data point). |
| **Governance** | **3-layer hierarchical:** (1) `AGENTS.md` 3KB **dev-guide** (root, contributors) — single source of truth, (2) `.agents/AGENTS.md` 18KB+ **user-guide** (deployed to `~/.aidevops/agents/AGENTS.md` for end-users), (3) **`CLAUDE.md` 440B + `AGENT.md` 420B = redirect-shims** to `AGENTS.md`. **CORPUS-FIRST AGENTS.md-authoritative-with-CLAUDE.md-shim INVERSION.** Plus README 142KB + CONTRIBUTING + SECURITY + CODE_OF_CONDUCT + CHANGELOG 350KB + CREDITS + TODO.md 1MB + TERMS + MODELS + MODELS-PERFORMANCE + 8 quality-gate tools (Codacy + CodeFactor + CodeRabbit + Sonar + Qlty + Bandit + secretlint + ShellCheck). **Heaviest governance per-archetype-age in corpus.** |
| **Agent/skill count** | **~2,665+ agentic primitives** across `.agents/` directory: **1,792 markdown files + 873 shell scripts** ("900+ subagents" claim is conservative). Higher-level: 13 specialist domain agents (code/automate/SEO/marketing/content/legal/sales/research/video/business/accounts/social-media/health) + 22 commands at top-level + 23 workflows + 79 tool families + 52 service integrations + 7 bundles + 11 hooks + 20 MCP integrations + 30+ external services. **EXTREME PRIMITIVE-COUNT — 5× ruflo v42 (~500); NEW CORPUS-RECORD.** |
| **i18n** | **EN-only** (notable absence at this surface scope; contrast paperclip v14 / OMC v27 / claude-howto v32 multi-language). British English (Jersey UK author). |
| **Intellectual influence** | **Explicit Lance Martin (LangChain) citation** (16-pattern lineage, README §"Agent Design Patterns") + **mngr (imbue-ai) MIT** (ratchet pattern + structured code-review categories + tmux/provider/idle-detection from CREDITS.md) + **Google Stitch DESIGN.md** (CREDITS.md) + **VoltAgent/awesome-design-md** (CREDITS.md — Pattern #57 4th data point; v25 wiki subject cited unaware) + **anomalyco/Claude** prompt-base lineage. Pattern #19 archetype 2 methodology-lineage **CORPUS-FIRST explicit Lance-Martin citation.** |
| **Agent platforms** | **OpenCode-first (recommended + tested)** + Claude Code via redirect-shim + headless dispatch (`headless-runtime-helper.sh run`). Multi-runtime support but unambiguously OpenCode-primary. **CORPUS-FIRST T1 with OpenCode-as-primary.** Prior 13 T1 entrants overwhelmingly Claude-Code-primary; OMC v27 multi-runtime (4 runtimes balanced). aidevops = 1st OpenCode-primary T1. Auth pool supports 4 providers (Anthropic / OpenAI / Cursor / Google). |

## Phase 0.5 — Pattern pre-check (v2.1 discipline; consolidation-forward)

**Target outcome: 0 new active candidates (extending unprecedented 10-streak v37-v46 to 11-consecutive v37-v47).**

### Patterns to strengthen (within-existing)

1. **Pattern #18 Agent Runtime Standardization** — **CORPUS-FIRST OpenCode-as-primary T1 observation.** Strengthening + new sub-observation "OpenCode-first plugin (default platform; Claude Code via redirect)". Distinct from prior T1 Claude-Code-primary OR multi-runtime patterns. **Pattern #18 ecosystem-diversity sub-observation NEW.**
2. **Pattern #22 AGENTS.md Industry Standard** — **CORPUS-FIRST AGENTS.md-as-authoritative-with-CLAUDE.md+AGENT.md-redirect-shims INVERSION.** All prior corpus subjects had CLAUDE.md as primary OR co-equal; aidevops explicitly demotes CLAUDE.md to compatibility shim. **3-layer governance hierarchy (root dev-guide / `.agents/` user-guide / shims) NEW formulation extension proposed at next mini-audit.**
3. **Pattern #28 Multi-Provider AI Support** — **NEW sub-observation: cross-provider VERIFICATION-not-routing as safety mechanism.** Aidevops verifies destructive operations (force push / production deploy / data migration) via second model from different provider. Distinct from prior #28 data points (all routing/abstraction). Verification-not-routing sub-axis proposed as Pattern #28 formulation extension at next mini-audit. **CORPUS-FIRST cross-provider verification.**
4. **Pattern #19 archetype 2 methodology-lineage** — **CORPUS-FIRST explicit Lance Martin (LangChain) citation** + 16-pattern documented lineage table. Pattern #19 archetype 2 was previously dominated by Karpathy + John Lam + (Boris Cherny / Dex Horthy / Cat Wu Anthropic-cluster). Lance Martin = 4th individual influence node. **Pattern #19 4th individual-influence-node observation.**
5. **Pattern #57 Recursive Corpus Reference** — **4TH DATA POINT** (after OMC v27 self-aware / dive-into-llms v39 LlamaFactory citation / Ollama v46 compound-2-wiki Pi+Karpathy). Aidevops CREDITS.md explicitly cites **VoltAgent/awesome-design-md (v25 wiki subject)** + Google Stitch DESIGN.md (v25 referenced). Marcus Quinn third-party-unaware. Base rate 4/47 = 8.5%.
6. **Pattern #17 variant 1 solo-individual** — Marcus Quinn 20-public-repos solo-publisher with prior 3.3K-star `git-updater` WordPress flagship + `evergreenjersey` / `awardsapp` / `wpallstars` brand affiliations + commercial `aidevops.sh` homepage. **18th data point at variant 1; 12th T1 instance.**
7. **Pattern #20 Solo-Scale Ceiling dictionary** — NEW ROW "Solo-individual + OpenCode-first + multi-domain + cross-domain agent platform (212 stars at 5.5 months / cold-start with mature surface)". Distinguishes from bizos v37 (cold-start with no surface) and agency-agents v18 (solo-at-enterprise-scale with viral path).
8. **Pattern #29 MIT** — strengthening (39th MIT-license observation across corpus).
9. **Pattern #12 Governance-Depth refined-formulation v42 3-factor model** — **counter-evidence at scope-tier:** solo + cold-start (212 stars) + heaviest-governance-per-age-bracket. v42 3-factor model predicts maturity-ambition+maintainer-philosophy+scale-tier; aidevops shows maintainer-philosophy DOMINATES (8-tool quality stack at 5.5-month-old / 212-star scale = philosophy-driven, not scale-driven). 4th counter-evidence wiki (claude-hud v35 + pi-mono v36 + ruflo v42 + aidevops v47). Reinforces refined formulation; no further refinement needed.
10. **Pattern #51 Vibe-Coding Spectrum** — README explicit "Sane vibe-coding through structure" + "Vibe-Coding is easy. DevOps is hard." (GitHub description). Spectrum-axis observation: **anti-vibe-pole structural-discipline data point** (joins spec-kit v17 explicit anti-vibe + opposes awesome-design-md v25 pro-vibe). Pattern #51 strengthening at confirmed-tier; no formulation change.
11. **Pattern #2 Distribution Evolution** — 5-surface distribution with verified npm provenance + Homebrew tap + curl-installer + Bun + manual git-clone. Strengthening data point.
12. **Pattern #27 Community-Viral Scale Path** — observational counter-evidence: 212 stars / 5.5 months ≈ 38 stars/month = **explicitly NOT community-viral** at this scale. Pattern #27 confirmed sub-paths do not include cold-start commercial-positioning. 4th observational counter-evidence (bizos v37 138% fork inversion + magika v44 industrial-deployment-vs-community-viral + DeepTutor v38 academic-amplified + aidevops v47 cold-start-mature-surface). Pattern #27 sub-path enumeration sufficient.

### Un-stale check (mandatory)

- **#45 Dual-Licensing** — aidevops MIT-only single-license. NEGATIVE.
- **#52 Extreme-Viral-Velocity** — 38 stars/month NOT extreme-viral (≥1K stars/day threshold). NEGATIVE.
- **3rd stale candidate** (per current PATTERN_LIBRARY.md state): NEGATIVE.

All stale checks NEGATIVE. Disciplined.

- Pattern #22 AGENTS.md-authoritative = sub-variant inversion (within-pattern, not counter-evidence).
- Pattern #12 solo-heavy-governance N=4 = consistent with v42 3-factor refined formulation.
- Pattern #28 cross-provider-verification = NEW sub-axis within pattern (verification-not-routing).

### Consolidation-forward discipline

**Target: 0 new active candidates / 0 new OBSERVATION-TRACKs (11th consecutive zero-registration wiki extending v37-v46 streak).**

## Phase 0.9 — Primitive-count probe outcome: **EXTREME (NEW CORPUS-RECORD)**

| Metric | Value | Tier comparison |
|---|---|---|
| Total `.md` files in `.agents/` | **1,792** | Largest count of agentic prose primitives in corpus |
| Total `.sh` files in `.agents/` | **873** | Largest helper-script count in corpus (vs pi-mono v36 ~390) |
| Combined agentic primitives | **~2,665+** | **5× ruflo v42 (~500+); NEW CORPUS-RECORD EXTREME tier** |
| Higher-level primitives | 13 domains + 22 cmds + 23 workflows + 79 tool families + 52 services + 7 bundles + 11 hooks + 20 MCPs + 30+ external services | EXTREME |
| TODO.md size | 1,031,375 bytes (~1MB) | Corpus-largest TODO file |
| CHANGELOG.md size | 349,612 bytes (~350KB) | Corpus-largest changelog |
| README.md size | 142,376 bytes (~142KB) | 2nd-largest README in corpus (after ruflo v42 280KB) |
| Quality-gate tool count | 8 (Codacy + CodeFactor + CodeRabbit + Sonar + Qlty + Bandit + secretlint + ShellCheck) | Corpus-most external quality-platform integrations |

**Outcome: 2nd EXTREME tier in corpus (1st = ruflo v42 ~500+).** aidevops v47 sets new corpus ceiling at ~2,665+ primitives.

### Scope-compression decisions

**4-entity format preserved via aggressive citation-not-replication:**

- **900+ subagents** → cite `subagent-index.toon` + per-domain directories; do NOT enumerate per-subagent
- **52 services** → enumerate categories only (Infrastructure / DNS / Git / AI / Security / Communications / Performance); cite `.agents/services/` for per-service detail
- **30+ external integrations** → cite README §"Comprehensive Service Coverage"; reproduce category headings only
- **22 commands + 23 workflows** → enumerate top-level only; cite `.agents/scripts/commands/` for per-command docs
- **20 MCP integrations** → reproduce table from README §"MCP Integrations" once; do NOT replicate per-MCP detail
- **TODO.md 1MB** → cite as "task ledger; not summarized"
- **CHANGELOG.md 350KB** → cite latest version + corpus-relevant signals only
- **5 follow-up deep-dive wikis flagged for v2.2:**
  1. Pulse Supervisor Deep Dive (autonomous orchestration architecture + 2-min cron + LLM-as-supervisor)
  2. 13-Domain Specialist Agent Catalog (per-domain workflow + subagent inventory)
  3. Mission Orchestration Architecture (multi-day autonomous projects + milestone validation + budget tracking)
  4. Cross-Provider Verification Stack (high-stakes operation taxonomy + multi-model safety + audit log)
  5. TOON Format + Token-Efficient Serialization (aidevops-originated format + 20-60% reduction analysis)

### Velocity tolerance

EXTREME tier: ~3h to ~3h 30min (within +50-75% overhead band).

## Phase 0.9b — Storm Bear meta-entity: 36th CONSECUTIVE (v10-v47)

**Aidevops as observational reference for Storm Bear vault — MEDIUM-HIGH relevance:**
- Cross-domain agent breadth (13 specialist domains) maps to Scrum-coach service-offering surface (technical / business / sales / marketing / legal / content advisory)
- Autonomous supervisor + mission orchestration could automate Scrum coaching backlog management
- AGENTS.md-authoritative pattern is candidate template for Storm Bear vault CLAUDE.md refactor (v27 diagnostic HIGH item #1 — see below)
- 8-tool quality-gate stack is template for vault quality discipline (currently Storm Bear has none)
- Cross-provider verification primitive is direct relevance to Scrum-coach client-facing operations safety

**Caveats:** OpenCode-first design = friction for Claude-Code-primary Storm Bear operator; learning curve EXTREME (~2,665 primitives); commercial positioning (paid pool services) creates mixed open-core lineage; cold-start scale (212 stars) means lower battle-tested confidence.

**Storm Bear pilot ranking estimate (post-v47): #6-8 range.** Below claude-hud v35 / spec-kit v17 / claude-howto v32 / OMC v27 / pi-mono v36 / claude-code-best-practice v34. Above ruflo v42 (commercial bias higher) / agency-agents v18 (no commercial layer).
